goal: Fix card border-radius globally and tighten shared header padding + text sizes
summary: Phase 1 completed successfully. Updated .card border-radius to 1rem (rounded-2xl) in globals.css, tightened mobile header padding in app layout, and converted all arbitrary text sizes in Sidebar and SidebarNav to standard Tailwind utilities. Build passes cleanly (npm run build exited 0). Lint also passes cleanly (npx next lint returned 0 errors, 0 warnings). The lint script uses `next lint` which is Next.js's standard ESLint wrapper; no lint errors exist in the codebase.
stepSummaries:
1. Update `.card` in globals.css: change `border-radius: var(--radius)` to `border-radius: 1rem` [verified]
  2. Fix mobile header padding in app/(app)/layout.tsx: px-4 py-3 → px-3 py-2, adjust top positioning if needed [verified]
  3. Convert text-[16px] → text-base in components/Sidebar.tsx logo [verified]
  4. Convert text-[10px] → text-xs in components/SidebarNav.tsx mobile labels [verified]
  5. Run build to verify no errors [verified]
